Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Dumping Lego NXT firmware off of an existing brick (2025) 222 upvotes, 13 comments
  2. CasNum 307 upvotes, 38 comments
  3. Some Words on WigglyPaint 42 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Emacs internals: Deconstructing Lisp_Object in C (Part 2) 93 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. The Collective Ambition Behind Odysseus, a Game-Changing Sci-Fi Larp 41 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. Phi-4-reasoning-vision and the lessons of training a multimodal reasoning model 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. In 1985 Maxell built a bunch of life-size robots for its bad floppy ad 125 upvotes, 19 comments
  8. Show HN: Curiosity – DIY 6" Newtonian Reflector Telescope 50 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. Sem – Semantic version control. Entity-level diffs on top of Git 42 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. Rijksmuseum researchers discover new painting by Rembrandt van Rijn 68 upvotes, 14 comments
  11. Autoresearch: Agents researching on single-GPU nanochat training automatically 138 upvotes, 36 comments
  12. How to run Qwen 3.5 locally 263 upvotes, 78 comments
  13. SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI 78 upvotes, 18 comments
  14. FLASH radiotherapy's bold approach to cancer treatment 218 upvotes, 67 comments
  15. The surprising whimsy of the Time Zone Database 148 upvotes, 51 comments
  16. I ported Linux to the PS5 and turned it into a Steam Machine 58 upvotes, 18 comments
  17. Cloud VM benchmarks 2026 279 upvotes, 127 comments
  18. From RGB to L*a*b* color space (2024) 62 upvotes, 22 comments
  19. Apple's 512GB Mac Studio vanishes, a quiet acknowledgment of the RAM shortage 134 upvotes, 58 comments
  20. Notes on Writing WASM 67 upvotes, 25 comments
  21. Warn about PyPy being unmaintained 246 upvotes, 119 comments
  22. Files are the interface humans and agents interact with 254 upvotes, 125 comments
  23. Yoghurt delivery women combatting loneliness in Japan 335 upvotes, 172 comments
  24. How Big Diaper absorbs billions of extra dollars from American parents 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  25. Show HN: A weird thing that detects your pulse from the browser video 100 upvotes, 44 comments
  26. Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread 25 upvotes, 7 comments
  27. The Lobster Programming Language 49 upvotes, 19 comments
  28. CLI RSS/Atom feed reader inspired by Taskwarrior, synced using Git 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. A decade of Docker containers 322 upvotes, 221 comments
  30. MonoGame: A .NET framework for making cross-platform games 92 upvotes, 61 comments

Last generated 10:00pm, 8 March 2026. Source here.
